_comment: Frequency-based job presets. Pick one to pre-fill the scope, service line and inclusions, then edit anything for the specific client. To add your own: copy a block, change the name/frequency/areas. Keep the commas and brackets as they are.

presets.name: Office cleaning — once per week

areas.name: Office and meeting areas
items: Vacuum and mop accessible floor areas
Dust and wipe accessible desks and surfaces

areas.name: Kitchen
items: Clean and wipe benches and accessible surfaces
Load cups into dishwasher where required

service_notes: Cleaning is scheduled once per week after hours.
Service is completed as required to cover the agreed scope.
Any additional work outside the agreed scope can be discussed and quoted separately.

services.name: Weekly Commercial Cleaning Service
services.description: Commercial cleaning as per agreed scope, including office areas, kitchen, bathrooms, rubbish removal and general presentation.

inclusions: Regular cleaner allocated to the site
Quality checks and follow up as required

presets.name: Strata cleaning — weekly

areas.name: Entry and common areas
items: Clean and mop entry, foyer and common floors
Spot clean glass doors and touch points

areas.name: Stairwells and lifts
items: Spot clean walls and touch points

areas.name: Bin store and common bathrooms
items: Clean and sanitise common toilets where applicable
Hose and tidy bin store area

service_notes: Cleaning is scheduled once per week.
Service is completed as required to cover the agreed scope.
Any additional work outside the agreed scope can be discussed and quoted separately.

services.name: Weekly Strata Cleaning Service
services.description: Common-area cleaning as per agreed scope, including entry, common floors, stairwells, lifts, bin store and general presentation.

inclusions: Regular cleaner allocated to the site
Quality checks and follow up as required

presets.name: Medical cleaning — 3 days per week

areas.name: Reception and waiting
items: Vacuum and mop all floor areas
Wipe and sanitise reception desk and seating

areas.name: Consult and treatment rooms
items: Sanitise benches, basins and touch points

areas.name: Bathrooms
items: Clean and sanitise toilets and basins

service_notes: Cleaning is scheduled 3 days per week after hours.
Hospital-grade disinfectant used on sanitised surfaces.
Cleaners follow infection-control and site access requirements.

services.name: Medical Cleaning Service (3x weekly)
services.description: Medical cleaning as per agreed scope, including reception, consult/treatment rooms, bathrooms, waste removal and sanitising of touch points.

inclusions: Regular cleaner allocated to the site
Cleaner briefed on infection control requirements
Quality checks and follow up as required

areas.name: Reception and waiting
items: Vacuum and mop all floor areas

areas.name: Consult and treatment rooms

presets.name: Industrial cleaning — 5 days per week

areas.name: Office and amenities
items: Vacuum and mop office floor areas

areas.name: Bathrooms and lunchroom
items: Clean and sanitise toilets and basins
Clean and wipe lunchroom benches and sink

areas.name: Workshop / warehouse floor
items: Sweep and/or scrub accessible floor areas
Do not touch tools, equipment or restricted areas

service_notes: Cleaning is scheduled 5 days per week.
Workshop and equipment areas are floor and amenity cleaning only unless otherwise agreed.
ACS cleaners will not touch tools, equipment or restricted work areas.

services.name: Daily Industrial Cleaning Service
services.description: Industrial cleaning as per agreed scope, including office, amenities, bathrooms, accessible workshop/warehouse floor areas, rubbish removal and general presentation.

inclusions: Regular cleaner allocated to the site
Cleaner briefed on secure areas and site requirements
Quality checks and follow up as required

default_terms.label: Service Start
default_terms.value: To be confirmed once the proposal is approved.

default_terms.label: Contract Period
default_terms.value: Ongoing month-to-month, with 30 days' written notice to cancel.

default_terms.label: Invoicing
default_terms.value: Monthly invoices are issued at the end of each service month.

default_terms.label: Payment Terms
default_terms.value: Payment due within 7 days of invoice date.

default_terms.label: Quality Assurance
default_terms.value: Regular supervision check-ins and quality follow up as required.

default_terms.label: Consumables
default_terms.value: All cleaning supplies and equipment are included at no extra cost.

default_terms.label: Insurance
default_terms.value: $20M Public Liability and current WorkCover Insurance are maintained at all times.

default_terms.label: Variations
default_terms.value: Any changes to scope or frequency will be discussed and agreed in writing prior to adjustment.
